item.title: Lithium Coin Batteries Recalled Due?to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Battery Ingestion; Violates Federal Statute for Child-Resistant Packaging of Coin Batteries; Imported and Sold on Amazon by LiCB
item.company: Guangzhou Lichengbei Battery Technology Co., Ltd., dba LiCB, of China
item.brand: Guangzhou Lichengbei Battery Technology Co., Ltd., dba LiCB, of China
item.summary: This recall involves LiCB-branded lithium coin batteries. The three-volt silver batteries were sold in packs of two, each with five batteries. The brand name and "CR2032" are embossed on the battery and printed on the product packaging.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: LiCB CR2032 3V Lithium Coin Batteries.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the coin batteries immediately, place them in an area that children cannot access, and contact LiCB for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to dispose of the batteries according to local hazardous waste guidelines. Note: Button cell and coin batteries are hazardous. Batteries should be disposed of or recycled by following local hazardous waste procedures.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
